tags.description: Optional array of tags for categorizing or describing the list.

listType.description: The type of list, e.g., 'watchlist', 'favorites', 'to-read', etc.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the list was created.

ordered.description: Indicates whether the list is ordered or unordered.

itemOrder.description: An array of item uris in the order they appear in the list. Stored separately from the items themselves to allow for efficient reordering without needing to update each item record.
